videos.headline: Miles Coleman scores a 46-yard TD for North Texas
videos.description: Drew Mestemaker goes deep to Miles Coleman, who comes down with the ball and scores a touchdown to give North Texas a 7-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miles Coleman scores a 46-yard TD for North Texas) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Landon Sides brings in a TD for North Texas
videos.description: Drew Mestemaker hits Landon Sides for a touchdown to extend North Texas' lead over Texas State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Landon Sides brings in a TD for North Texas) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas State jumps in front on a Jordan McCloud dime
videos.description: Jordan McCloud's back foot heave finds Jaden Williams in the end zone to give Texas State the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas State jumps in front on a Jordan McCloud dime) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lincoln Pare punches it in to pad Texas State's lead
videos.description: Lincoln Pare barrels across the goal line to pad the Bobcats' lead before hitting the "Gangnam Style" dance in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Lincoln Pare punches it in to pad Texas State's lead) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Evan Jackson goes 'Stone Cold' on INT
videos.description: Evan Jackson pays homage to North Texas football alum "Stone Cold" Steve Austin by mimicking his signature celebration.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Evan Jackson goes ‘Stone Cold’ on INT) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drew Mestemaker leaves it all on the field ... literally
videos.description: Drew Mestemaker breaks off a 70-yard touchdown run to keep North Texas' hopes alive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drew Mestemaker leaves it all on the field ... literally) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Treylin Payne ices it with game-ending INT
videos.description: Treylin Payne seals Texas State's SERVPRO First Responder Bowl win with an interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Treylin Payne ices it with game-ending INT) 2025/01/03 ESHEET
